nasb.text: Moreover, he shall not multiply horses for himself, nor shall he cause the people to return to Egypt to multiply horses, since the Lord has said to you, ‘You shall never again return that way.’

esv.text: Only he must not acquire many horses for himself or cause the people to return to Egypt in order to acquire many horses, since the Lord has said to you, ‘You shall never return that way again.’

cnv.text: 只是君王不可為自己加添馬匹，也不可使人民回埃及去，為要加添馬匹，因為耶和華曾經對你們說過：‘你們不可再回到那條路去。’

ccb.text: 王不可拥有大量马匹，也不可派人到埃及去购买马匹，因为耶和华已经告诉你们不可回埃及。
